reasoning: Test file shows solid engineering with thorough edge case coverage (empty string, None, missing keys, case insensitivity) and well-documented functions. Type hints are present but lack TypedDict for state/player_character shapes which would improve safety. The abbreviated helper names `_gs`/`_pc` are acceptable for test context but sacrifice some clarity. No error handling concerns given this is test code. Overall high-quality work that just misses top marks due to missing TypedDict definitions.
